examples: He was in a less jocular mood than usual.
He is a jocular man, especially around women.
Mr. Tsarnaev was outgoing and jocular, Mr. Todashev serious and reserved, Mr. Trites said.
The work closes with an outrageous bassoon solo, as free and jocular as anything in the repertoire.
He ended his sometimes somber, sometimes jocular remarks with what he said was his message for God.
